ideation: This animation sequence depicts a mage performing a spell. The sequence will focus on expressive arm movements that suggest magical energy. The arms will move in a dynamic fashion, suggesting the casting of a spell. The left arm will move in a wider arc, while the right arm will have more precise movements, as if manipulating magical energy. Each frame will show a distinct position, not an intermediary step, allowing for a smooth transition between frames handled by a separate system. Frame 1 will show both arms in a neutral position, suggesting preparation. Frame 2 will show the left arm raised and extended, as if gathering energy. Frame 3 will show the right arm moving forward, as if directing the energy. Frame 4 will show both arms returning to a neutral position. Frame 5 will show the arms resting in a relaxed pose.

frames.beat: arms ready, a moment of quiet focus
left arm sweeps up, gathering arcane power
right arm thrusts forward, directing the spell's energy
energy released, arms return to neutral stance
